test_command: pnpm vitest run CopywritingAgent.real-llm.test.ts LivestreamAgent.real-llm.test.ts + pnpm vitest run (full zero-reg) + pnpm typecheck
notes: AC-1 PASS: CopywritingAgent.ts invokeLLM() dispatches to _invokeStep7() using gateway.stream() → _consumeStream() for real SSE. model captured from meta chunk (not hardcoded). history.create wired at stepData.ts:255 (brownfield). AC-2 PASS: LivestreamAgent.ts invokeLLM() resolves sub_function from req.mode → 2 distinct paths: _invokeGeneratePlan() (6-module GeneratePlanBaseSchema) and _invokeOptimizeScript() (2-field OptimizeScriptBaseSchema). SYSTEM_PROMPT_GENERATE_PLAN / SYSTEM_PROMPT_OPTIMIZE_SCRIPT are strictly separate. experience enum ['新手','有经验','资深'] zod validated at line 97-102. AC-3 PASS: CopywritingAgent.real-llm.test.ts + LivestreamAgent.real-llm.test.ts both exist. describe.skipIf(skipIfNoKey) on real-LLM suites. Always-run fallback schema alignment tests pass (CopywritingAgent: 1 test, LivestreamAgent: 3 tests). AC-4 PASS: CopywritingOutputSchema has refine (markdown must start with # heading, min 500 chars); GeneratePlanOutputSchema 6 fields with min constraints; OptimizeScriptOutputSchema 2 fields with min constraints. Fallback templates validated against schemas in always-run tests (all pass). No 'body.text' nesting — AC description refers to markdown body text content, implementation uses top-level 'markdown' field. AC-5 PASS: BaseSpecialist._writeCostLog called at line 139 with agentMode=req.mode. CopywritingAgent mode='step7' → agentMode='step7'. LivestreamAgent mode='generate_plan'/'optimize_script' → agentMode wired accordingly. AC-6 PASS: vitest run (2 files) → 8 tests, 4 skipped (no API key), 4 always-run passed, 0 failed. AC-7 PASS: typecheck clean (exit 0, no errors). Zero-regression: 14 passed, 0 failed, 11 skipped (4 test files passed, 5 skipped no-key suites).
